event.name: From the ages before Humankind
event.description: Stand back. Admire your work. It is impressive whether you come from Surface or Neath.

messages.message: You succeeded in a Mithridacy challenge!
messages.tooltip: The art of confusion and deception, of misleading the listener without a single false word.

possession.levelDescription: Your skeleton is missing two limbs
possession.description: How many limbs do you still need to add to your skeleton? They might be arms, legs, wings, or fins.

messages.tooltip: How many limbs do you still need to add to your skeleton? They might be arms, legs, wings, or fins.

possession.name: Skeleton: Legs

possession.name: Femur of a Jurassic Beast
possession.nameAndLevel: 37 x Femur of a Jurassic Beast
possession.description: It comes from the Surface, but the Surface a very long time ago.
possession.availableAt: These can be achieved by studying an Unidentified Thigh Bone at your Laboratory.

possession.name: Skeleton: Antiquity
possession.description: Is it old? Very old? Older than that?

messages.message: Your skeleton contains several bones from millennia ago.
